info.name: WorkPulse API

request.description:
Start a work session. Accepts user_id (optional, defaults to current user). Admins can start for any user, managers can start for their team members.

**Response (201 Created):**
```json
{
  "session_id": 123,
  "session": {
    "id": 123,
    "user_id": 1,
    "start_time": "2026-02-16T12:00:00Z",
    "end_time": null,
    "last_activity_at": "2026-02-16T12:00:00Z",
    "total_active_seconds": 0,
    "total_idle_seconds": 0,
    "status": "active"
  }
}
```

query.description: Optional: Filter by date in YYYY-MM-DD format

request.description: Get the actual screenshot image file. Returns the PNG image directly. **Response:** - Content-Type: `image/png` - Returns the raw image file - Can be displayed in browser or saved to disk **Example Usage:** - Open in browser: `https://your-api.com/api/v1/screenshots/4/image` - Display in HTML: `` - Download: Use `curl` or `wget` with Authorization header

query.description: Filter by organization_id (optional, defaults to current user's org)

request.description: Get all managers in an organization. Admin only.

query.description: Filter users by manager_id (optional, for admins/managers only)
Date in YYYY-MM-DD format (required for detailed activity)

request.description: Get detailed user activity for a specific date. Includes metrics, hourly intensity, telemetry, screenshots, and activity_minutes. Manager/Admin only.

query.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format (optional, defaults to today)

request.description: Get minute-by-minute activity data for a user. Manager/Admin only.

query.description: Filter by date in YYYY-MM-DD format (optional)

request.description: Get screenshots for a user. Manager/Admin only.

query.description: Filter by date in YYYY-MM-DD format (optional)

request.description:
Get complete batch activity data for a user, including all sessions with their activity minutes and screenshots. Returns data grouped by session with aggregated totals. Manager/Admin only.

**Response (200 OK):**
```json
{
  "user": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "John Doe",
    "email": "john@example.com"
  },
  "date": "2026-02-16",
  "sessions": [
    {
      "sessionId": 123,
      "startTime": "2026-02-16T08:00:00Z",
      "endTime": "2026-02-16T17:00:00Z",
      "lastActivityAt": "2026-02-16T16:58:00Z",
      "status": "stopped",
      "totalMinutes": 480,
      "aggregatedData": [
        {
          "id": 1,
          "fullTimestamp": "2026-02-16T08:00:00Z",
          "activeSeconds": 55,
          "idleSeconds": 5,
          "keyboardEvents": 120,
          "mouseEvents": 80,
          "activeWindowTitle": "VS Code",
          "windowTitles": {},
          "projectId": 1,
          "taskId": 5,
          "projectName": "Time Champ",
          "taskName": "API Development",
          "activeUrl": null,
          "status": "Active",
          "screenshotPath": null
        }
      ],
      "summary": {
        "totalActiveSeconds": 26400,
        "totalIdleSeconds": 2400,
        "totalKeyboardEvents": 57600,
        "totalMouseEvents": 38400,
        "screenshots": [
          {
            "id": 1,
            "timestamp": "2026-02-16T08:05:00Z",
            "sessionId": 123,
            "userId": 1,
            "filePath": "/path/to/screenshot.png",
            "imageUrl": "/api/v1/screenshots/1/image"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "total_sessions": 1,
  "aggregated_totals": {
    "total_active_seconds": 26400,
    "total_idle_seconds": 2400,
    "total_keyboard_events": 57600,
    "total_mouse_events": 38400,
    "total_screenshots": 48
  }
}
```

query.description: Filter by status: pending, approved, rejected
